creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Me, too!

I'm supposed to build 11.1-RELENG-p6 for now on recent CURRENT and it doesn't build. Neither a release build nor the base system's packages.

I've also running poudriere (last update, latest version for now) on CURRENT, building ports for 11.1-RELNG. The jail performing this doesn't update from -p3 to -p6 anymore!

Please reopen! Or I'll file another PR.
